dashboard.subtitle: Key metrics for your organization at a glance.

usage.title: Usage & quotas

inviteUsers.subtitle: Choose how you want to bring teachers or students into your institution. You can change this later.
inviteUsers.continueDisabledHint: Choose the email invitation option to continue.

emailWizard.separatorHint: Paste or type as many email addresses as you like — one per line, separated by spaces, or with commas. We'll take care of the rest and let you know if anything looks off.
emailWizard.successDescription: Recipients will get an email with a link to join your institution.
emailWizard.errorTitle: Some invitations could not be sent
emailWizard.errorDescription: Review the addresses below and try again. Duplicate or invalid invites may be rejected.
emailWizard.missingInstitution: Your account is not linked to an institution. Refresh or contact support.

email.title: Email invitation
email.description: Enter one or more addresses and send a secure join link by email.

file.title: Import file
file.description: Upload a CSV or spreadsheet so everyone is invited or provisioned in one batch.

qr.title: QR code
qr.description: Show a QR code at events or in the classroom so people can join on the spot.

users.subtitle: Manage students, teachers, and staff in your institution.

actions.disabledPeerInstitutionAdmin: Managing other institution admins is restricted for security. Use a platform administrator if needed.

withdrawFromClassDialog.title: Withdraw from class
withdrawFromClassDialog.bodyStudent: The student is removed from this classroom. They lose access to all content, tasks, and games in this classroom. Their account and all other classrooms remain unaffected.
withdrawFromClassDialog.bodyTeacherCoTeacher: The teacher is removed as co-teacher from this classroom. They can no longer view or manage its content. Their own courses and other classroom assignments remain unaffected.

removeFromInstitutionDialog.title: Remove from institution?
removeFromInstitutionDialog.bodyStudent: The student leaves the institution entirely. They lose access to all classrooms, courses, games, and data of this institution. Their account remains active but is locked out of this school.
removeFromInstitutionDialog.bodyTeacher: The teacher leaves the institution entirely. All courses and games they created remain within the institution. Their account stays active but they no longer have access to this school.
removeFromInstitutionDialog.bodyCoTeacher: The co-teacher leaves the institution entirely. All classroom assignments are revoked. Their account remains active but access to this institution is fully blocked.
removeFromInstitutionDialog.bodyUnknown: This person will lose access to this institution once removal is confirmed.

empty.title: No users in this view
empty.description: Try clearing the role filter or invite members to your institution.

toasts.removeFromInstitutionSuccessDescription: {{name}} will lose access to this institution once the membership API confirms left_institution_at.

users.missingInstitutionContext: No institution context loaded for your account.

facultyProgrammes.noFacultyDescription: No description provided for this faculty.

facultyProgrammes.emptyTitle: No programmes in this faculty yet
facultyProgrammes.emptyDescription: Add a programme to start building cohorts and class groups.
facultyProgrammes.searchPlaceholder: Search by programme name or description…

programmeOfferings.subtitle: Time-bound runs for this programme with their current status.
programmeOfferings.programmeNotFound: This programme could not be found in the selected faculty.
programmeOfferings.empty: No offerings exist for this programme yet.
programmeOfferings.emptyFiltered: No offerings match your current filter.
programmeOfferings.filterPlaceholder: Filter by year, term code, or status…

cohorts.title: Cohorts
cohorts.subtitle: Intakes and year groups within programmes.
cohorts.empty: Cohort management UI is coming soon.

classGroups.title: Class groups
classGroups.subtitle: Operational learner groups within cohorts.
classGroups.empty: Class group management UI is coming soon.

faculty.title: Faculty
faculty.definition: The top-level organizational unit of your institution. A faculty groups related training programs.
exampleValues: Description: All nursing and medical training tracks of the district hospital group

programme.title: Programme
programme.definition: A specific training track inside a faculty. It defines what is taught, independent from when it runs or who attends.
exampleValues: Description: General nursing training aligned with legal standards
Other examples: OTA training, sterile processing, nursing assistant training

programmeOffering.title: Programme offering
programmeOffering.definition: A concrete time-bound run of a programme. Here you define when this programme run starts and ends.

cohort.title: Year group
cohort.definition: A concrete group of trainees starting together. This is the human group that moves through the programme together.

cohortOffering.title: Year group offering
cohortOffering.definition: The time-bound assignment of a year group to a programme offering. It defines how long this group is active in this run.
cohortOffering.reason: Separate from programme offering because a year group can start later or run on a different timeline.

classGroup.title: Class group
classGroup.definition: The operational unit inside a year group - usually one class of about 15 to 25 trainees.
exampleValues: Description: First class of year group 2025 at Reutlingen campus
If there are 40 trainees: PF-A 2025 and PF-B 2025

classGroupOffering.title: Class group offering
classGroupOffering.definition: The active period in which this class group is actually taught. Timetables, rooms and teachers connect here later.
classGroupOffering.reason: In training year 2, create a new class group offering with a new period, for example 01.09.2026 to 31.08.2027.

fields.descriptionHint: Describe what this faculty covers and how it fits your institution—programmes, focus areas, or who it is for.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Undergraduate and graduate programmes in nursing, public health, and allied health professions.

programme.descriptionPlaceholder: What learners achieve, duration notes, entry requirements.

offering.intro: Define one or more programme offerings (academic year / term window). Values are saved when API wiring is ready.
offering.termCodeHint: Format: 1–6 uppercase letters, dash, 4-digit year (e.g. GVM-2026)

cohort.intro: Name the intake or year group within this programme.

cohortOffering.intro: Define the calendar window for this cohort.

summary.intro: Review all configured entries before creating this faculty structure.

submit.missingInstitution: No institution context loaded for your account.
submit.successDescription: {{facultyName}} and its structure were created successfully.
submit.successAppendDescription: New programme and related structure were added for {{facultyName}}.

prefill.facultyNotFound: That faculty does not exist or you cannot access it.

classGroup.intro: Name the class that learners will be assigned to.
classGroup.suggestionsLabel: Suggestions based on your programme — click to select or type a custom name below.

classGroupOffering.intro: Define the calendar window for this class group.

faculty.title: Faculty
faculty.description: A top-level department in the institution that groups related programmes (for example, Nursing or Vocational Training).

programme.title: Programme
programme.description: A course of study within a faculty that defines what learners train for and how long it takes (for example, “Nursing Assistant”).

cohort.title: Cohort
cohort.description: An intake or year group within a programme (for example, “Cohort 2026”) that is typically archived after graduation.

classGroup.title: Class group
classGroup.description: A concrete class within a cohort that represents the real-world group of learners (for example, “WIB2-A”).

classroom.title: Classroom
classroom.description: The teaching space on the platform where lessons, games, and tasks are assigned, linking a teacher, a class group, and a subject (for example, “Chemistry WIB2-A”).

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.subtitle: View and manage classrooms linked to your institution.

licenses.title: Licenses
licenses.subtitle: What plan you have and which features are included.
licenses.empty: No subscription found for this institution.
licenses.noFeatures: No features configured on this plan.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Subscription term, renewal and payment details.
